name: Olive Garden Mostaccioli Quatro Formaggio
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend 4 cheeses thoroughly and place in a covered container in the fridge.
2. Preheat a non-stick or heavy pan on medium heat.
3. Add the cream and cheeses; mix and heat, stirring until cheese is completely melted and sauce is hot.
4. Add the pasta and turn off the heat. Blend the pasta into the sauce.
5. Remove the sauced pasta to serving plates and garnish each plate with a parsley bouquet.
6. Pass the Parmesan.
